title: Add blinding salt to scope commitment in AgentPolicy and Delegation

artifacts.description: Add blindingSalt as a private input signal; replace Poseidon2(permissionBitmask, credentialCommitment) with Poseidon3(permissionBitmask, credentialCommitment, blindingSalt) for scopeCommitment
Same Poseidon2 → Poseidon3 change for scopeCommitment; add blindingSalt private input
Regenerated Groth16/PLONK verifier from updated AgentPolicy.circom; public signal indices shift if scopeCommitment index changes — must audit calldata layout in AgentPolicyGateway.sol
Regenerated verifier from updated Delegation.circom; same public-signal-layout audit required
Update publicSignals[] index constants for scopeCommitment and any downstream signals shifted by the new circuit layout
Export generateBlindingSalt() (32-byte CSPRNG); update ProverInput type to include blindingSalt; update buildAgentPolicyInput() and buildDelegationInput() helpers

Positive: valid proof with blinded commitment verifies on-chain. Negative: omitted salt (zero) still produces valid proof but commitment differs from Poseidon2. Collision test: two distinct salts produce distinct scopeCommitments for identical bitmask+credential. Constraint delta regression: assert compiled constraint count ≤ baseline + 350

Update formal definition to scopeCommitment = Poseidon3(permissionBitmask, credentialCommitment, blindingSalt); document hiding vs binding properties; note blindingSalt must be stored off-chain by the prover to reconstruct the commitment

steps: Audit AgentPolicy.circom and Delegation.circom to locate all Poseidon2 calls for scopeCommitment and record current public signal index layout
In both circuits, add 'signal input blindingSalt;' as a private input immediately after credentialCommitment
Replace 'component scopeHash = Poseidon(2)' with 'component scopeHash = Poseidon(3)' and wire scopeHash.inputs[2] <== blindingSalt in both circuits
Compile updated circuits with circom --r1cs --wasm --sym; confirm constraint delta is ~300 (one Poseidon3 round vs Poseidon2)
Re-run snarkjs phase2 contribution or reuse existing ptau to generate new .zkey files for AgentPolicy and Delegation
Export updated Solidity verifiers via snarkjs zkey export solidityverifier; diff public signal count and index order against prior verifiers
Patch AgentPolicyGateway.sol and any contract that indexes publicSignals[] by position to use updated scopeCommitment index
Update SDK buildAgentPolicyInput() and buildDelegationInput() to accept and pass blindingSalt; add generateBlindingSalt() utility using crypto.getRandomValues
Write tests/test_scope_blinding_salt.py covering: valid blinded proof, zero-salt edge case, collision independence, and constraint count regression
Run full test suite (pytest + hardhat); confirm all existing tests pass with updated verifier ABIs
Update spec/scope-commitment.md with new Poseidon3 definition, hiding argument, and off-chain salt storage requirement
dependencies: circomlib poseidon.circom (Poseidon with 3 inputs already supported via nInputs parameter)
existing AgentPolicy.circom public signal layout documentation
existing Delegation.circom public signal layout documentation
snarkjs >= 0.7 for updated phase2 and verifier export
hardhat for contract recompilation and on-chain verifier tests
Node.js crypto.getRandomValues or equivalent CSPRNG for SDK salt generation
